problem_statement: The selected read-only worker path has a runtime receipt candidate envelope, but the next evidence boundary needs a schema-backed witness proving future runtime receipt schema-binding prerequisites while keeping live runtime authority blocked.
success_criteria: ReadOnlyWorkerRuntimeReceiptSchemaBindingWitness validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
the witness binds the runtime receipt candidate, runner binding witness, emitter dry-run, handoff, binding, lease preflight, and rehearsal evidence
runtime receipt schema binding remains unperformed
runtime receipt schema registry write remains unperformed

the future schema-binding path requires candidate schema validation, candidate example validation, live runner evidence, runtime emitter evidence, active lease evidence, UAO, Phi_gov, effect reconciliation, and receipt-store write-path evidence
focused tests reject authority drift, contract drift, missing refs, binding-evaluation drift, admission drift, receipt-ref drift, count drift, and terminal-closure drift
non_goals: no runtime receipt schema registry write
no launch, production, customer, or support readiness claim
constraints: runtime receipt schema binding remains unperformed
runtime receipt schema registry write remains unperformed
future runtime admission must still require temporal lease evidence, UAO, Phi_gov, recovery evidence, receipt-store evidence, and verification
WorkerFailureReceipt remains mandatory for failed or partial dispatch evidence
raw output retention remains denied and only output digests may be carried
Mfidel atomicity remains preserved and no text-processing decomposition is introduced
evidence_required: runtime receipt schema-binding witness validator receipt
focused pytest receipt for schema-binding witness behavior
workspace governance preflight receipt before closure claim
